mapper.select: SELECT c_value FROM BOOKDREAM_CONFIG WHERE c_no = 8
SELECT NVL(SUM(r_price), 0) FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST WHERE TO_CHAR(r_created, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')
SELECT c_value FROM BOOKDREAM_CONFIG WHERE c_no = 7
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST WHERE user_no = #{user_no} AND r_src = #{r_src} AND r_state >= 0 AND TO_CHAR(r_created, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
SELECT c_value FROM BOOKDREAM_CONFIG WHERE c_no = 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST WHERE user_no = #{user_no} AND r_src = #{r_src} AND r_state >= 0 AND TO_CHAR(r_created, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST WHERE r_isbn = #{r_isbn} AND r_src = #{r_src} AND r_state >= 0 AND r_state <= 50
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(r_no), 0)+1 FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST
INSERT INTO BOOKDREAM_REQUEST ( r_no, r_src, user_no, user_id, store_no, co_no, r_isbn, r_title, r_author, r_price, r_pay_type, r_pay, r_image, r_publisher, r_pubdate, r_name, r_hp, r_tel, r_zip, r_addr, r_email, r_state, r_calc, r_payed, r_return_close, r_return, r_refund, r_created, r_updated ) VALUES ( #{r_no}, #{r_src}, #{user_no}, #{user_id}, #{storeCode}, '', #{isbn}, #{title}, #{author}, #{price}, '', 0, #{image}, #{publisher}, #{pubdate}, #{r_name}, #{mobileno}, #{tellno}, #{r_zip}, #{addres}, #{email}, '10', '', '', #{r_return_close}, #{r_return}, #{r_refund}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST WHERE user_no = #{user_no}

${pagingTop} SELECT r_no, r_src, user_no, user_id, store_no, co_no, r_isbn, r_title, r_author, r_price, r_pay_type, r_pay, r_image, r_publisher, r_pubdate, r_name, r_hp, r_tel, r_zip, r_addr, r_email, r_state, r_calc, r_payed, r_return_close, r_return, r_refund, r_created, r_updated, (select code_name from cms_code where homepage_id='h3' and group_id = 'H0006' and code_id = r_state) as r_state_nm, r_created + 5 as r_created5, r_payed + 14 as r_return_close14 FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST WHERE user_no = #{user_no} ORDER BY r_created desc ${pagingBottom}

SELECT r_no, r_src, user_no, user_id, store_no, (select code_name from cms_code where homepage_id='h3' and group_id = 'H0005' and code_id = store_no) as storeCode, co_no, r_isbn, r_title, r_author, r_price, r_pay_type, r_pay, r_image, r_publisher, r_pubdate, r_name, r_hp, r_tel, r_zip, r_addr, r_email, r_state, r_calc, r_payed, r_return_close, r_return, r_refund, r_created, r_updated, (select c_value from bookdream_config where c_no = 1) as fromTel, (select c_value from bookdream_config where c_no = 2) as fromTel2, (select c_value from bookdream_config where c_no = 3) as fromTel3, d3_send_yn, dday_send_yn FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST WHERE r_no = #{r_no}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(rh_no), 0)+1 FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST_HISTORY
INSERT INTO BOOKDREAM_REQUEST_HISTORY ( rh_no, r_no, rh_type, rh_set, rh_get, rh_post, rh_session, rh_ip, rh_referer, rh_url, rh_created, rh_state ) VALUES ( #{rh_no}, #{r_no}, #{rh_type}, #{rh_set}, #{rh_get}, #{rh_post}, #{rh_session}, #{rh_ip}, #{rh_referer}, #{rh_url}, SYSDATE, #{rh_set} )
mapper.select: SELECT r_no, r_src, user_no, user_id, store_no, (select code_name from cms_code where homepage_id='h3' and group_id = 'H0005' and code_id = store_no) as storeCode, co_no, r_isbn, r_title, r_author, r_price, r_pay_type, r_pay, r_image, r_publisher, r_pubdate, r_name, r_hp, r_tel, r_zip, r_addr, r_email, r_state, r_calc, r_payed, r_return_close, r_return, r_refund, r_created, r_updated FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST WHERE r_no = #{r_no} AND user_no = #{user_no}
SELECT c_no, c_code, c_name, c_value, c_note, c_created, c_updated FROM BOOKDREAM_CONFIG WHERE c_no <= 13 OR c_no >= 17 ORDER BY c_no
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOKDREAM_CONFIG SET c_value = #{c_value}, c_updated = SYSDATE WHERE c_no = #{c_no}
mapper.select: SELECT s_no, s_id, s_pw, s_name, s_owner, s_tel, s_created, s_updated FROM BOOKDREAM_STORE ORDER BY s_no
SELECT s_no, s_id, s_pw, s_name, s_owner, s_tel, s_created, s_updated FROM BOOKDREAM_STORE WHERE s_no = #{s_no}

SELECT rh_no, r_no, rh_type, rh_set, rh_get, rh_post, rh_session, rh_ip, rh_referer, rh_url, rh_created, rh_state, (select code_name from cms_code where homepage_id='h3' and group_id = 'H0006' and code_id = rh_state) as r_state_nm FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST_HISTORY WHERE r_no = #{r_no} AND rh_type != 'modify' ORDER BY rh_no
SELECT s_no, s_id, s_pw, s_name, s_owner, s_tel, s_created, s_updated FROM BOOKDREAM_STORE WHERE s_id = #{s_id} AND s_pw = #{s_pw}
SELECT c_value FROM BOOKDREAM_CONFIG WHERE c_no = #{c_no}
SELECT c_no, c_code, c_name, c_value, c_note, c_created, c_updated FROM BOOKDREAM_CONFIG WHERE c_state = #{r_state} AND rownum = 1

select r_no, r_src, user_no, user_id, store_no, (select code_name from cms_code where homepage_id='h3' and group_id = 'H0005' and code_id = store_no) as storeCode, co_no, r_isbn, r_title, r_author, r_price, r_pay_type, r_pay, r_image, r_publisher, r_pubdate, r_name, r_hp, r_tel, r_zip, r_addr, r_email, r_state, r_calc, r_payed, r_return_close, r_return, r_refund, r_created, r_updated, (select c_value from bookdream_config where c_no = 1) as fromTel, (select c_value from bookdream_config where c_no = 2) as fromTel2, (select c_value from bookdream_config where c_no = 3) as fromTel3, d3_send_yn, dday_send_yn from bookdream_request where r_return_close is not null and TO_CHAR(r_return_close-3, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') and r_state = '20' and d3_send_yn = 'N' ORDER BY r_no

SELECT r_no, r_src, user_no, user_id, store_no, (select code_name from cms_code where homepage_id='h3' and group_id = 'H0005' and code_id = store_no) as storeCode, co_no, r_isbn, r_title, r_author, r_price, r_pay_type, r_pay, r_image, r_publisher, r_pubdate, r_name, r_hp, r_tel, r_zip, r_addr, r_email, r_state, r_calc, r_payed, r_return_close, r_return, r_refund, r_created, r_updated, (select c_value from bookdream_config where c_no = 1) as fromTel, (select c_value from bookdream_config where c_no = 2) as fromTel2, (select c_value from bookdream_config where c_no = 3) as fromTel3, d3_send_yn, dday_send_yn FROM BOOKDREAM_REQUEST WHERE r_return_close IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(r_return_close, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND r_state = '20' AND dday_send_yn = 'N' ORDER BY r_no
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOKDREAM_REQUEST SET d3_send_yn = #{d3_send_yn}, dday_send_yn = #{dday_send_yn} WHERE r_no = #{r_no}

UPDATE BOOKDREAM_REQUEST SET r_state = #{batch} WHERE r_no IN
${no}
